title: AI-Generated Slides: Are They Good? Can Students Tell?

title: RealICU: Do LLM Agents Understand Long-Context ICU Data? A Benchmark Beyond Behavior Imitation
description:
arXiv:2605.13542v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Intensive care units (ICU) generate long, dense and evolving streams of clinical information, where physicians must repeatedly reassess patient states under time pressure, underscoring a clear need for reliable AI decision support. Existing ICU benchm

title: Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
description:
arXiv:2605.13737v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that join

title: Harnessing Agentic Evolution
description:
arXiv:2605.13821v1 Announce Type: new

title: TokaMind for Power Grid: Cross-Domain Transfer from Fusion Plasma
description:
arXiv:2605.11033v1 Announce Type: cross
